CurrentIssues.ID: ArgumentListWrapping:ApiDebugCounterResetBugTest.kt$ApiDebugCounterResetBugTest$(1, firstOfTurn2, "Today's executeTask creates a fresh AtomicInteger(0) per turn, so both " + "counters issue '1' as their first call — clobbering call-001-*.txt")

ArgumentListWrapping:ApiDebugCounterResetBugTest.kt$ApiDebugCounterResetBugTest$(afterTurn2.contains("call-002-request.txt"), "Expected turn 2's request to be dumped as call-002-request.txt, " + "but api-debug/ contained: $afterTurn2.")

ArgumentListWrapping:ApiDebugCounterResetBugTest.kt$ApiDebugCounterResetBugTest$(call001.contains("TURN-ONE-UNIQUE-MARKER"), "call-001-request.txt should still contain turn 1's content, but got:\n" + call001.take(400))

ArgumentListWrapping:ApiDebugCounterResetBugTest.kt$ApiDebugCounterResetBugTest$(call002.contains("TURN-TWO-UNIQUE-MARKER"), "call-002-request.txt should contain turn 2's content, but got:\n" + call002.take(400))

ArgumentListWrapping:ApiDebugCounterResetBugTest.kt$ApiDebugCounterResetBugTest$(listOf("call-001-request.txt", "call-002-request.txt", "call-003-request.txt"), dumps, "Within one turn, api-debug counter must produce 001, 002, 003 — no overwrites.")
ArgumentListWrapping:AssistantMessageParserTest.kt$AssistantMessageParserTest$(tools[0].params["content"]!!.contains("Page B"), "First tool should NOT contain second tool's content")
ArgumentListWrapping:AttachmentSinkContractTest.kt$FakeAttachmentSink$(sha256 = digest, mime = mime, size = bytes.size.toLong(), originalFilename = originalFilename)

ArgumentListWrapping:AuthTestService.kt$AuthTestService$("[Core:Auth] Connection test failed for ${serviceType.name} — SSL error: ${e.message}. " + "If using a self-signed certificate, add it to the JDK truststore.", e)
ArgumentListWrapping:AuthTestService.kt$AuthTestService$("[Core:Auth] Connection test failed for ${serviceType.name} — authentication failed (401). Response: ${body.take(200)}")
ArgumentListWrapping:AuthTestService.kt$AuthTestService$("[Core:Auth] Connection test failed for ${serviceType.name} — connection refused: ${e.message}", e)
ArgumentListWrapping:AuthTestService.kt$AuthTestService$("[Core:Auth] Connection test failed for ${serviceType.name} — endpoint not found (404) at ${request.url}. Check the base URL.")
ArgumentListWrapping:AuthTestService.kt$AuthTestService$("[Core:Auth] Connection test failed for ${serviceType.name} — forbidden (403). Response: ${body.take(200)}")
ArgumentListWrapping:AuthTestService.kt$AuthTestService$("[Core:Auth] Connection test failed for ${serviceType.name} — server returned ${it.code}: ${it.message}. Response: ${body.take(200)}")
ArgumentListWrapping:AuthTestService.kt$AuthTestService$("[Core:Auth] Connection test for ${serviceType.name} returned redirect (${it.code}) to $location")
ArgumentListWrapping:AuthTestService.kt$AuthTestService$("[Core:Auth] Sourcegraph auth failed (401). Token may be invalid or expired. Response: ${body.take(200)}")

ArgumentListWrapping:AuthTestService.kt$AuthTestService$(ErrorType.FORBIDDEN, "Authenticated as $username, but the LLM API is disabled by your site admin. " + "Contact your Sourcegraph administrator to enable it.")
ArgumentListWrapping:AuthTestService.kt$AuthTestService$(ErrorType.NETWORK_ERROR, "Connection refused: ${e.message}. Check that the service is running and the URL/port are correct.", e)
ArgumentListWrapping:AuthTestService.kt$AuthTestService$(ErrorType.NETWORK_ERROR, "SSL certificate error: ${e.message}. For self-signed certs, add the certificate to your JDK truststore.", e)
ArgumentListWrapping:AuthTestService.kt$AuthTestService$(ErrorType.SERVER_ERROR, "Endpoint not found (404). Check the base URL — it should not include a path like /rest or /api.")

ArgumentListWrapping:BitbucketBranchClient.kt$BitbucketBranchClient$(ErrorType.VALIDATION_ERROR, "STALE_VERSION: comment was modified by another user; re-fetch and retry")

ArgumentListWrapping:CommitMessagePromptBuilder.kt$CommitMessagePromptBuilder$("- If neither fits the DIFF (the diff is unrelated to either ticket), still use ACTIVE — but reflect the actual change in the body, not the ticket title.")

ArgumentListWrapping:CommitMessagePromptBuilder.kt$CommitMessagePromptBuilder$("- Use ONLY the ticket ID you select from CANDIDATE TICKETS. Do NOT copy ticket IDs from RECENT COMMITS — those are style/tone references only.")

ArgumentListWrapping:CommitMessagePromptBuilder.kt$CommitMessagePromptBuilder$("RECENT COMMITS (for tone and vocabulary only — the FORMAT and TYPES sections above are authoritative):")

ArgumentListWrapping:GenerateCommitMessageAction.kt$GenerateCommitMessageAction$("[AI:CommitMsg] Diff preview (first 40 lines, full length=${diff.length}):\n$diffPreview${if (diff.length > diffPreview.length) "\n...<truncated>" else ""}")

ArgumentListWrapping:GenerateCommitMessageAction.kt$GenerateCommitMessageAction$("[AI:CommitMsg] Generating: ${diff.length} char diff, active='${activeTicketId ?: "<none>"}' branch='${branchTicketId ?: "<none>"}' candidates=${candidateTickets.size} (${candidateTickets.joinToString(",") { "${it.details.key}/${it.source}" }}), ${recentCommits.size} recent commits, codeContext=${codeContext.length} chars")

ArgumentListWrapping:GenerateCommitMessageAction.kt$GenerateCommitMessageAction$("[AI:CommitMsg] getRecentCommits: running 'git log -5 --no-merges' on root='${repo.root.path}' branch='${repo.currentBranch?.name ?: "<detached>"}' (no upstream-range filter — walks full HEAD history including merged-in commits)")

ArgumentListWrapping:MessageSanitizerTest.kt$MessageSanitizerTest$("Let me read the file for you.", assistantMsg!!.content, "Non-empty content alongside tool calls must NOT be overwritten")
ArgumentListWrapping:MessageSanitizerTest.kt$MessageSanitizerTest$("user", result.first().role, "Conversation must start with a user message")
ArgumentListWrapping:MessageSanitizerTest.kt$MessageSanitizerTest$("user", result.last().role, "Anthropic-via-Vertex rejects assistant-prefill — final message must be user")
ArgumentListWrapping:MessageSanitizerTest.kt$MessageSanitizerTest$("user", result.last().role, "Tool tail is coerced to user in Phase 1 — Phase 6 must not double-append")

ArgumentListWrapping:MessageSanitizerTest.kt$MessageSanitizerTest$(result.any { it.role == "assistant" && it.toolCalls.isNullOrEmpty() }, "Assistant message with empty content and no tool calls must be dropped")

ArgumentListWrapping:MessageSanitizerTest.kt$MessageSanitizerTest$(toolResultMsg.content!!.contains("<tool_result>"), "Tool result must use plain text prefix, not XML tags")
ArgumentListWrapping:ModelPricingTest.kt$ModelPricingTest$(ModelPricingRegistry.lookup("claude-sonnet-4"), "Bundled entries must survive user override merge")

ArgumentListWrapping:MutationInvalidationInterceptorTest.kt$MutationInvalidationInterceptorTest$(0L, HttpCacheMetrics.getStats("jira").invalidatedByMutation, "GET must never fire mutation invalidation — reads don't invalidate")

ArgumentListWrapping:MutationInvalidationInterceptorTest.kt$MutationInvalidationInterceptorTest$(1L, HttpCacheMetrics.getStats("jira").entriesInCache, "cache must survive a failed mutation — state didn't actually change")

ArgumentListWrapping:MutationInvalidationInterceptorTest.kt$MutationInvalidationInterceptorTest$(HttpResponseCache.get(keyFor("/rest/api/2/issue/PROJ-1")), "PROJ-1 GET entry must still be present after a sibling GET")

ArgumentListWrapping:PrCommentTest.kt$PrCommentTest$( id = "1", version = 0, text = "hello", author = PrCommentAuthor("u", "U"), createdDate = 1, updatedDate = 1, state = PrCommentState.OPEN, severity = PrCommentSeverity.NORMAL, )

ArgumentListWrapping:PrDescriptionPromptBuilder.kt$PrDescriptionPromptBuilder$("- First sentence of Summary must stand alone — a reader should understand the change from that sentence without reading further.")

ArgumentListWrapping:PrDescriptionPromptBuilder.kt$PrDescriptionPromptBuilder$("- Generic descriptions: \"Fix bug\", \"Update dependencies\", \"Phase 1\", \"Misc improvements\" — these tell the reviewer nothing.")

ArgumentListWrapping:PrDescriptionPromptBuilder.kt$PrDescriptionPromptBuilder$("1–2 paragraphs. First sentence is a self-contained tl;dr: what this PR delivers and why, understandable without reading the code. Add a second sentence or short paragraph for the user-visible or developer-visible outcome.")

ArgumentListWrapping:PrDescriptionPromptBuilder.kt$PrDescriptionPromptBuilder$("Bullet list of logical, behavior-level deltas in imperative mood. Each bullet describes a capability, contract, or behavior change — NOT a file edit. Group related bullets. Use `backticks` for class/method/config names.")
ArgumentListWrapping:PrDescriptionPromptBuilder.kt$PrDescriptionPromptBuilder$("Generate a pull request description in markdown. Output ONLY the markdown — no preamble, no wrapping code blocks.")

ArgumentListWrapping:PrDescriptionPromptBuilder.kt$PrDescriptionPromptBuilder$("Key design decisions, trade-offs, and alternatives considered. Call out anything non-obvious a reviewer should understand BEFORE reading the diff, or any area that deserves extra scrutiny. This is where you explain the HOW at a design level (not line-by-line). Omit for mechanical PRs.")

ArgumentListWrapping:PrDescriptionPromptBuilder.kt$PrDescriptionPromptBuilder$("NOTE: Diff is unavailable. Base `## Changes` and `## Implementation Notes` on commit messages and Jira context only. Write conservative claims grounded in that evidence — do NOT invent design rationale, architectural decisions, or test scenarios the commits don't support. If a section would require guessing, write \"_(to be filled by author)_\" and omit other detail for that section.")

ArgumentListWrapping:PrDescriptionPromptBuilder.kt$PrDescriptionPromptBuilder$("One specific sentence stating what kind of review is most valuable: e.g. \"Correctness of the retry/backoff logic under concurrent failures\", \"API naming and error shape\", \"Security review of the token scope\", \"LGTM unless you spot issues\". (Research: specifying feedback type increases merge rate by 64–72%.)")
ArgumentListWrapping:PrDescriptionPromptBuilder.kt$PrDescriptionPromptBuilder$("STRUCTURE (follow exactly, in this order; omit a section only when it would be empty or not applicable):")

ArgumentListWrapping:PrDescriptionPromptBuilder.kt$PrDescriptionPromptBuilder$("Skip this section entirely for mechanical/trivial PRs (renames, typo fixes, dependency bumps with no behavior change).")
ArgumentListWrapping:PrDescriptionPromptBuilder.kt$PrDescriptionPromptBuilder$("Specific scenarios the reviewer should verify — not generic \"test the feature\". Format as a checklist:")
ArgumentListWrapping:PrDescriptionPromptBuilderTest.kt$PrDescriptionPromptBuilderTest$(result.contains("A".repeat(2001)), "Should not contain more than 2000 description chars for primary")
ArgumentListWrapping:PrDescriptionPromptBuilderTest.kt$PrDescriptionPromptBuilderTest$(result.contains("B".repeat(801)), "Should not contain more than 800 desc chars for additional ticket")
ArgumentListWrapping:PrDescriptionPromptBuilderTest.kt$PrDescriptionPromptBuilderTest$(result.contains("Comment body #5"), "11th-oldest comment should be excluded from primary (max 10 shown)")
ArgumentListWrapping:PrDescriptionPromptBuilderTest.kt$PrDescriptionPromptBuilderTest$(result.contains("Update dependencies"), "AVOID list should name 'Update dependencies' as a bad example")
ArgumentListWrapping:PrServiceTemplateTest.kt$PrServiceTemplateTest$("PROJ-123: Fix login bug", PrTitleRenderer.render("{ticketId}: {summary}", "PROJ-123", "Fix login bug", "feature/PROJ-123", 120))

ArgumentListWrapping:PrTitlePromptBuilderTest.kt$PrTitlePromptBuilderTest$(result.contains("Imperative mood") || result.contains("imperative mood"), "Prompt should specify imperative mood")

ArgumentListWrapping:PrTitlePromptBuilderTest.kt$PrTitlePromptBuilderTest$(result.contains("Output ONLY the title") || result.contains("Output the title only"), "Prompt should instruct model to output only the title")

ArgumentListWrapping:SonarModelToStringTest.kt$SonarModelToStringTest$( line = 9, code = "throw e", coverageStatus = "uncovered", conditions = null, coveredConditions = null )

ArgumentListWrapping:UrlScreenerTest.kt$UrlScreenerTest$("IPv4 literal allowed when toggled", "https://203.0.113.1/", allowIpLiteral = true)

ArgumentListWrapping:UrlScreenerTest.kt$UrlScreenerTest$("JWT token redacted", query = "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxMjM0NTY3ODkwIn0.SflKxwRJSMeKKF2QT4fwpMeJf36POk6yJV_adQssw5c", expectContains = "<jwt-redacted>", expectRedacted = true)
ArgumentListWrapping:UrlScreenerTest.kt$UrlScreenerTest$("Pure Unicode (not homograph) gets IDN flag only", "https://日本.example", expectFlag = UrlScreener.Flag.IDN_NON_ASCII)
ArgumentListWrapping:UrlScreenerTest.kt$UrlScreenerTest$("http allowed when https not required", "http://example.com", httpsRequired = false)
ArgumentListWrapping:UrlScreenerTest.kt$UrlScreenerTest$("normal query passes unchanged", query = "normal docs query", expectContains = "normal docs query", expectRedacted = false)
ArgumentListWrapping:UrlScreenerTest.kt$UrlScreenerTest$(result is QueryScreenResult.Pass, "Expected Pass for query '${c.query}', got $result")
ArgumentListWrapping:UrlScreenerTest.kt$UrlScreenerTest$(result is QueryScreenResult.Reject, "Expected Reject for query '${c.query}', got $result")
ArgumentListWrapping:WebError.kt$WebError.NoProviderConfigured$("NO_PROVIDER_CONFIGURED", "No web_search provider configured in settings", true)
ArgumentListWrapping:WebError.kt$WebError.ProviderUrlUnsafe$("PROVIDER_URL_UNSAFE", "Provider $provider base URL rejected by safety guard: $reason", false)
ArgumentListWrapping:WebError.kt$WebError.WebFetchDisabled$("WEB_FETCH_DISABLED", "web_fetch is disabled in Workflow Orchestrator settings", false)
ArgumentListWrapping:WebError.kt$WebError.WebSearchDisabled$("WEB_SEARCH_DISABLED", "web_search is disabled in Workflow Orchestrator settings", false)

ArgumentListWrapping:WorkflowContextServiceMutatorsTest.kt$WorkflowContextServiceMutatorsTest$("main", service.state.value.prRepoBranch, "reconcile must re-read prRepoBranch when repo is still configured")
ArgumentListWrapping:WorkflowIntent.kt$WorkflowIntent.SUBMIT_FOR_REVIEW$( "In Review", "Submit for Review", "Ready for Review", "Code Review", "Peer Review" )
ArgumentListWrapping:WorkflowToolWindowFactory.kt$WorkflowToolWindowFactory.<no name provided>$("Clear Active Ticket", "Remove the current active ticket", AllIcons.Actions.Cancel)
ArgumentListWrapping:WorkflowToolWindowFactory.kt$WorkflowToolWindowFactory.<no name provided>$("Open Bamboo", "Open Bamboo build dashboard in browser", AllIcons.General.Web)
ArgumentListWrapping:WorkflowToolWindowFactory.kt$WorkflowToolWindowFactory.<no name provided>$("Open SonarQube", "Open SonarQube dashboard in browser", AllIcons.General.Web)
ArgumentListWrapping:WorkflowToolWindowFactory.kt$WorkflowToolWindowFactory.<no name provided>$("Refresh All Tabs", "Rebuild all tabs with latest settings", AllIcons.Actions.ForceRefresh)
ComplexCondition:FileLinkResolver.kt$FileLinkResolver$editor != null && link.line != null && link.endLine != null && link.endLine != link.line

ComplexCondition:RepositoriesConfigurable.kt$RepositoriesConfigurable$edited.name != saved.name || edited.bitbucketProjectKey != saved.bitbucketProjectKey || edited.bitbucketRepoSlug != saved.bitbucketRepoSlug || edited.bambooPlanKey != saved.bambooPlanKey || edited.sonarProjectKey != saved.sonarProjectKey || edited.dockerTagKey != saved.dockerTagKey || edited.defaultTargetBranch != saved.defaultTargetBranch || edited.canonicalCloneUrl != saved.canonicalCloneUrl || edited.isPrimary != saved.isPrimary

ComplexCondition:SourcegraphChatClient.kt$SourcegraphChatClient$finalFinishReason != "upstream_timeout" && parsedBlocks?.any { it is ToolUseContent && it.partial } == true && finalToolCalls.isNullOrEmpty()

MultiLineIfElse:BaseUrlValidator.kt$BaseUrlValidator$return "Link-local address '$host' is not allowed (includes AWS IMDS 169.254.169.254)."
MultiLineIfElse:JiraLinkResolver.kt$JiraLinkResolver$"Jira base URL not configured — set it in Tools > Workflow Orchestrator settings"
MultiLineIfElse:LiveOnlyEnablement.kt$"Disabled: focused PR is on a different branch. Switch to ${focusFromBranch ?: "<none>"} to enable."

PropertyWrapping:MultiRepoScopeInvariantTest.kt$MultiRepoScopeInvariantTest$/** * Editor-or-primary resolvers on [com.workflow.orchestrator.core.settings.RepoContextResolver]. * These resolvers always return *some* repo by chaining current-editor → configured primary → * `repositories.firstOrNull()`. That makes them dangerous defaults — UI and service code that * already knows the repo from a stronger user-action signal (checked changes, focused PR, * selected build, clicked ticket) silently loses that signal when these resolvers run instead. * * The 2026-04-27 sweep audit found 11 misuse sites (see * `docs/architecture/repo-resolution-sweep-plan.md`). To prevent regression, every call to * one of these resolvers MUST sit on the same or an adjacent line as a `// editor-fallback-allowed:` * comment explaining why editor/primary is the right answer here. */ private val editorOrPrimaryResolverPattern = Regex("""\.(resolveCurrentEditorRepoOrPrimary|resolveFromCurrentEditor|getPrimary)\b\(""")

PropertyWrapping:RepositoriesConfigurable.kt$RepositoriesConfigurable$// --- Repository table state --- private val repoTableColumnNames = arrayOf("Name", "Bitbucket", "Bamboo Plan", "Docker Tag", "SonarQube", "Canonical URL", "Primary")

SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithAnnotations:BuildProblemsServiceImpl.kt$ReflectiveMavenProblemsProbe$@Suppress("UNCHECKED_CAST") val mavenProblems = invokeAny(mavenProject, "getProblems", "problems") as? List<Any> ?: continue
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithAnnotations:ComboBoxes.kt$<no name provided>$@Suppress("UNCHECKED_CAST") val full = textOf(value as T?)

SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:AiSettings.kt$AiSettings.State$/** * Max output tokens for non-agent text generation (PR titles, PR descriptions, commit * messages). Must be > the selected model's thinking.budget_tokens — Sourcegraph * rejects thinking-capable models with HTTP 400 ("max_tokens must be greater than * thinking.budget_tokens") when this is unset or too small. 16000 safely covers the * typical 4000–10000 thinking budget while keeping responses concise. */

SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:ApiResult.kt$ErrorType.AUTH_REDIRECT$/** * The server replied with HTML (typically a login redirect) where JSON was expected. * Distinct from [AUTH_FAILED] (HTTP 401) because the original request often returns * 200 OK with a `text/html` body when the auth cookie/PAT has expired and the server * silently redirects to the login page. Callers should surface this as * "your session expired, re-authenticate in Settings" rather than the generic 401 copy. * * Detected via [com.workflow.orchestrator.core.services.looksLikeAuthRedirect]. */

SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:ApiResult.kt$ErrorType.STALE_VERSION$/** * Optimistic-locking conflict: the resource changed between the GET-modify-PUT * cycle and the server rejected the update with 409. Used by Bitbucket PR * mutations after [com.workflow.orchestrator.core.bitbucket.BitbucketBranchClient.modifyPullRequest] * exhausts its single retry. Callers should surface * "the PR was updated by someone else — refresh and try again". */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:AutoDetectOrchestrator.kt$AutoDetectOrchestrator$// Per-session set of repo labels that have already been notified about a missing
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:AutoDetectOrchestrator.kt$AutoDetectOrchestrator$// cs is service-injected: supervisor-scoped, cancelled on project/plugin dispose
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:BuildEventCaptureServiceImpl.kt$BuildEventCaptureServiceImpl.Companion$// ProjectSystemId.id for Gradle. Using a string literal to avoid a compile-time

SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:ModelCatalogService.kt$ModelCatalogService.Companion$/** * Default stream API version when `/.api/client-config` has not been * fetched. v8 is the lowest version that accepts `image_url` content * parts on `/.api/completions/stream`. */

SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:PluginSettings.kt$PluginSettings.State$/** * Last user-chosen Sonar Quality tab mode (0=unset/follow heuristic, * 1=Overall, 2=NewCode). On unset, the panel defaults to NewCode for * non-main branches and Overall on main. On set, the user's choice wins * across IDE restarts. Stored as Int because BaseState's `property` doesn't * have a nullable Boolean delegate. */

SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:PluginSettings.kt$PluginSettings.State$/** * Multiline template used to insert a copyright header into files that * don't have one (Handover → Copyright → Fix All). `{year}` is replaced * with the current year. Comment-wrapping for the file's language is * applied at write time by `CopyrightFixService.wrapForLanguage`. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:PluginSettings.kt$PluginSettings.State$/** Cache entry lifetime in minutes. Matches Claude Code's default. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:PluginSettings.kt$PluginSettings.State$/** Custom field ID for the Jira acceptance-criteria field (e.g. "customfield_10001"). Null = unused. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:PluginSettings.kt$PluginSettings.State$/** Maximum number of cached entries (LRU eviction beyond this). */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:PluginSettings.kt$PluginSettings.State$/** Maximum number of search results returned to the agent. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:PluginSettings.kt$PluginSettings.State$/** Maximum snippet length (chars) returned per search hit after sanitization. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:PluginSettings.kt$PluginSettings.State$/** Per-call timeout for the mandatory LLM egress screener. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:PluginSettings.kt$PluginSettings.State$/** When true, PR creation uses AI to generate a richer PR title from ticket + diff context. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:PluginSettings.kt$PluginSettings.State$// When on, Agent-A's proposed answer to Agent-B's clarifying questions
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:RepoConfig.kt$RepoConfig$/** Server-anchored HTTPS clone URL, populated after first successful Bitbucket validation. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:TextGenerationService.kt$TextGenerationOutcome.ContextOverflow$/** The provider rejected the prompt because it exceeded the model's context window. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:TextGenerationService.kt$TextGenerationOutcome.Other$/** Any other failure (auth, network, timeout, parse). [message] is logged, not user-facing. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:UrlSafetyGuard.kt$UrlSafetyGuard.Reason.SHARED_SPECIAL_USE$/** Shared/special-use IPv4: carrier-grade NAT `100.64.0.0/10` and benchmarking `198.18.0.0/15`. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:UrlSafetyGuard.kt$UrlSafetyGuard.Reason.UNRESOLVABLE_HOST$/** Host could not be resolved by DNS — fail-closed. */

SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:WebError.kt$WebError.EgressScreenerUnavailable$/** The mandatory egress LLM screener could not be reached (timeout/error/unparseable). * Fail-closed: the search is not sent, because safety cannot be guaranteed. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:WebError.kt$WebError.HttpError$/** Catch-all for unclassified transport failures; prefer the specific subtypes above. */

SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:WebError.kt$WebError.HttpReadTimeout$/** Read-stage (response body) timeout. Distinct from [HttpTimeout], which covers connect/redirect stages via a dynamic code. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:WebError.kt$WebError.ProviderUrlUnsafe$/** The provider's configured base URL failed the UrlSafetyGuard / UrlPipeline screen. */

UseCheckOrError:LlmBrainFactory.kt$LlmBrainFactory$throw IllegalStateException( "No models available from Sourcegraph. Check your connection and token in Settings > Workflow Orchestrator > General." )
VariableNaming:SessionsPanel.kt$SessionsPanel$private val COLUMNS = arrayOf("Time", "Task", "Model", "Tokens In", "Tokens Out", "Est. Cost")

Wrapping:AuthTestService.kt$AuthTestService$("[Core:Auth] Connection test failed for ${serviceType.name} — SSL error: ${e.message}. " + "If using a self-signed certificate, add it to the JDK truststore.", e)

Wrapping:BambooSpecsParserTest.kt$BambooSpecsParserTest$(javaDir.resolve("PlanProperties.java"), """ package constants; public class PlanProperties { private static final String REPOSITORY_NAME = "my-sample-service"; private static final String PLAN_KEY = "MYSAMPLESERVICE"; private static final String DOCKER_TAG_NAME = "MySampleServiceDockerTag"; public static final String PROJECT_KEY = "MYPROJ"; } """.trimIndent())

Wrapping:GenerateCommitMessageAction.kt$GenerateCommitMessageAction$AnAction( "Generate with Workflow", "Generate commit message using AI", AllIcons.Actions.Lightning ), com.intellij.openapi.project.DumbAware

Wrapping:InsightsPromptPrototype.kt$InsightsPromptPrototype$("mechanicalStats", buildJsonObject { put("sessionCount", mechanical.sessionCount.toString()) put("totalTokensIn", mechanical.totalTokensIn.toString()) put("totalTokensOut", mechanical.totalTokensOut.toString()) put("totalCostUsd", "%.4f".format(mechanical.totalCostUsd)) put("distinctDays", mechanical.distinctDays.toString()) put("models", mechanical.modelUsage.keys.joinToString(", ")) })

Wrapping:WorkflowToolWindowFactory.kt$WorkflowToolWindowFactory$(ToolWindowManagerListener.TOPIC, object : ToolWindowManagerListener { private var lastSettingsSnapshot = settingsSnapshot(project) override fun toolWindowShown(tw: ToolWindow) { if (tw.id != toolWindow.id) return val current = settingsSnapshot(project) if (current != lastSettingsSnapshot) { lastSettingsSnapshot = current val selectedTab = toolWindow.contentManager.selectedContent?.displayName buildTabs(project, toolWindow) // Restore previously selected tab if (selectedTab != null) { toolWindow.contentManager.contents .firstOrNull { it.displayName == selectedTab } ?.let { toolWindow.contentManager.setSelectedContent(it) } } } } })
